# Copilot Repository Instructions

Apply these instruction files by default for all coding and review tasks in this repository:

- `.github/instructions/code-quality-and-architecture.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/git-commits.instructions.md`

## Enforcement Order

1. `code-quality-and-architecture.instructions.md`
2. `git-commits.instructions.md` (when preparing commits)

## Scope

- Use `code-quality-and-architecture.instructions.md` when implementing, refactoring, or reviewing code.
- Use `git-commits.instructions.md` when writing commit messages, staging commit-ready changes, or preparing release commit history.

If instructions conflict, prefer repository architecture and security constraints first, then commit-format rules.
